'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists videos cascade Hibernate: create table videos ( duration integer, course_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6) not null, file_size bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, lesson_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, status varchar(20) not null check (status in ('UPLOADING','PROCESSING','READY','FAILED')), content_type varchar(50), title varchar(200), blob_storage_key varchar(500), failure_reason varchar(500), original_url varchar(500), thumbnail_url varchar(500), transcoded_url varchar(500), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create index idx_videos_lesson_id on videos (lesson_id) Hibernate: create index idx_videos_status on videos (status) Hibernate: create index idx_videos_course_id on videos (course_id) 2026-04-16T23:02:30.636+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA testcase.name: getVideosByLesson_shouldReturnEmptyForMissing
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select v1_0.id, v1_0.blob_storage_key, v1_0.content_type, v1_0.course_id, v1_0.created_at, v1_0.duration, v1_0.failure_reason, v1_0.file_size, v1_0.lesson_id, v1_0.original_url, v1_0.status, v1_0.thumbnail_url, v1_0.title, v1_0.transcoded_url, v1_0.updated_at from videos v1_0 where v1_0.lesson_id=?

testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T23:02:31.421+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Uploading video for lesson 2: title='Process Test', contentType=video/mp4, fileSize=50000000 Hibernate: insert into videos (blob_storage_key, content_type, course_id, created_at, duration, failure_reason, file_size, lesson_id, original_url, status, thumbnail_url, title, transcoded_url, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-04-16T23:02:31.429+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Video 2 created with UPLOADING status for lesson 2 2026-04-16T23:02:31.430+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Video 2 transitioned to PROCESSING 2026-04-16T23:02:31.431+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Processing video 2 (simulated transcoding) 2026-04-16T23:02:31.431+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Video 2 processing complete — status: READY, duration: 488s

testcase.name: getVideosByCourse_shouldReturnVideos
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T23:02:31.472+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Uploading video for lesson 7: title='Course Video 1', contentType=video/mp4, fileSize=50000000 Hibernate: insert into videos (blob_storage_key, content_type, course_id, created_at, duration, failure_reason, file_size, lesson_id, original_url, status, thumbnail_url, title, transcoded_url, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-04-16T23:02:31.475+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Video 5 created with UPLOADING status for lesson 7 2026-04-16T23:02:31.475+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Video 5 transitioned to PROCESSING 2026-04-16T23:02:31.475+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Uploading video for lesson 8: title='Course Video 2', contentType=video/mp4, fileSize=60000000 Hibernate: insert into videos (blob_storage_key, content_type, course_id, created_at, duration, failure_reason, file_size, lesson_id, original_url, status, thumbnail_url, title, transcoded_url, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-04-16T23:02:31.477+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Video 6 created with UPLOADING status for lesson 8 2026-04-16T23:02:31.477+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Video 6 transitioned to PROCESSING Hibernate: update videos set blob_storage_key=?, content_type=?, course_id=?, duration=?, failure_reason=?, file_size=?, lesson_id=?, original_url=?, status=?, thumbnail_url=?, title=?, transcoded_url=?, updated_at=? where id=? testcase.name: markVideoFailed_shouldSetFailedStatus
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T23:02:31.539+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Uploading video for lesson 3: title='Fail Test', contentType=video/mp4, fileSize=50000000 Hibernate: insert into videos (blob_storage_key, content_type, course_id, created_at, duration, failure_reason, file_size, lesson_id, original_url, status, thumbnail_url, title, transcoded_url, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-04-16T23:02:31.542+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Video 9 created with UPLOADING status for lesson 3 2026-04-16T23:02:31.543+01:00 INFO 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Video 9 transitioned to PROCESSING 2026-04-16T23:02:31.544+01:00 WARN 756 --- [video-service] [ main] c.eduverse.video.service.VideoService : Video 9 marked FAILED — reason: Transcoding error
